description_long: This is a classic upright arcade game cabinet featuring the iconic Pac-Man branding. The cabinet is primarily yellow with black trim and displays colorful artwork of Pac-Man and a blue ghost on both side panels. The front panel includes a control panel with two joysticks and several buttons, as well as a coin slot mechanism below the controls. The upper section houses a marquee with the 'PAC-MAN' logo and character illustrations, while the central area contains a CRT display showing the Pac-Man game screen. The cabinet is constructed from wood or particleboard with a hard, smooth finish, and is designed to be freestanding in public or recreational spaces.
description: A classic yellow Pac-Man arcade game cabinet with colorful side artwork, a control panel, and a CRT display. Features a prominent marquee and coin slot on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the control panel with joysticks and buttons, coin slot, CRT screen displaying the game, and the Pac-Man marquee at the top.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the large Pac-Man and blue ghost artwork, with the yellow cabinet body and black trim.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain yellow back panel with no visible artwork or features.
description_view_3: Right side view, similar to the left, displaying the same Pac-Man and blue ghost artwork and yellow finish.
attribute_screen_type: CRT display, curved, medium size with visible bezel
attribute_control_panel_layout: Two joysticks and multiple buttons arranged for two-player side-by-side play, with a black control panel and red button accents
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features the 'PAC-MAN' logo in yellow and orange with cartoon Pac-Man and ghost characters on a white background, matching the playful and colorful theme
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Large, colorful artwork of Pac-Man and a blue ghost on a yellow background, with the 'PAC-MAN' logo and stylized maze elements
